title: Peekaboo
html:
AI-search visibility SaaS — the competitor that collided with Yahir's Insight AI sketch at 4 AM on Oct 24 2025. Does almost exactly what Yahir had spec'd 24 hours earlier: AI presence score, competitor benchmarking, LLM-citation tracking, agency-tier pricing $100/$200/custom. Founded by john rice (CTO) and filipe lins duarte (CEO). The discovery is the immediate trigger that shifted Yahir off direct-to-end-client AEO and toward whitelabel — which became Rankett.

TL;DR

  • 16 inbound citations — virtually all from the Oct 18 → Nov 18 2025 collision/reckoning window.
  • Discovered 4 AM Oct 24 2025 (2025 10 24 screenshot 2025 10 24 at 4 15 22 am f3a7573c) — the night after Yahir sketched insight ai in two screenshots.
  • Pricing tiers are competitive but lower-end: $100 / $200 / custom — Rankett's eventual $998/seat is positioned above this.
  • Founders: john rice (CTO) + filipe lins duarte (CEO).
  • The collision is load-bearing for the whitelabel pivot — direct competition at the B2C-AEO layer is exactly what made the agency-channel distribution attractive.

Why this collision mattered

  1. Validated the thesis. Another team raised, built, shipped — AI-visibility SaaS is a real market.
  2. Killed the B2C path. Yahir wasn't going to win a feature war against a funded incumbent at $100–200/mo pricing.
  3. Forced the channel question. If end-client SaaS is taken, where's distribution? Answer: agencies.
  4. Carried into Rankett's positioning. Rankett's pitch deck implicitly carves around Peekaboo — "we sell to the agencies your Peekaboo customers might churn from."

Key facts

  • Discovery moment. 2025 10 24 screenshot 2025 10 24 at 4 15 22 am f3a7573c — 4 AM screenshot of Peekaboo's site = the moment Yahir saw it.
  • Pricing tiers reverse-engineered. 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 40 46 pm 92e6c470 — Yahir's tier sketch from the night before; the discovery overlap is uncanny.
  • Continued surveillance. 2025 10 29 screenshot 2025 10 29 at 1 37 30 pm 53f7ca64 / 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 2 03 36 am a0ae9d76 / 2025 10 31 screenshot 2025 10 31 at 10 18 33 pm abec172c / 2025 11 18 screenshot 2025 11 18 at 11 33 13 pm ac095aed — Yahir tracks Peekaboo's moves through November.
  • Earliest reference. 2025 09 22 screenshot 2025 09 22 at 11 30 13 am 2984c5ab is actually the earliest mention — Peekaboo was on Yahir's radar before the Insight AI sketch but the gravity didn't register until Oct 24.

Source summaries

  • 2025 10 24 screenshot 2025 10 24 at 4 15 22 am f3a7573c — collision moment
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 33 39 pm 5fd5798f — Yahir's funnel night-before
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 34 12 pm 6ff06ea0 — dashboard mockup
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 7 40 46 pm 92e6c470 — pricing
  • 2025 10 29 screenshot 2025 10 29 at 1 37 30 pm 53f7ca64
  • 2025 10 29 screenshot 2025 10 29 at 8 54 01 pm fa39f428
  • 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 2 03 36 am a0ae9d76
  • 2025 10 31 screenshot 2025 10 31 at 10 18 33 pm abec172c
  • 2025 11 18 screenshot 2025 11 18 at 11 33 13 pm ac095aed
  • 2025 09 22 screenshot 2025 09 22 at 11 30 13 am 2984c5ab — earliest mention

Plus ~3 additional surveillance screenshots.

Connections

  • insight ai — the project Peekaboo collided with
  • rankett — the strategic shift the collision catalyzed
  • aeo agency — broader product context
  • john rice · filipe lins duarte — founders
  • ai visibility engine · ai search optimization · share of voice — domain
  • chatgpt · gemini · perplexity · anthropic claude — target surfaces (shared with Peekaboo)
  • whitelabel strategy · 60 day activation rule — strategic-shift consequences
